mapper.select:
select t.*,s.real_name create_user_name,s2.real_name appro_person_name from report_auto_create_info t left join sys_user s on s.user_id =t.create_user_id left join sys_user s2 on s2.user_id =t.appro_person_id where 1=1
and t.create_user_id = #{loginUserId}
and t.report_name like concat('%',#{reportAutoCreateInfo.reportName},'%')
order by t.create_time desc
